About Me

I build things with AI.

I'm a 2nd year CS student at Bennett University specialising in AI. Currently interning at AiMill where I work on production ML pipelines.

I love solving problems — whether it's a DSA challenge at 6am or building an ML model that actually works in the real world.

📍 Greater Noida 🎓 Bennett University 2028 💼 Open to internships 2027

Projects

Things I've Built

ML · Python ↗ GitHub

AI Food Recommendation System

Content-based filtering engine using cosine similarity to match users with food options based on dietary preferences.

Python Pandas Scikit-learn Cosine Similarity
ML · Healthcare Coming to GitHub

HealthNet — Disease Prediction

ML classification model that predicts health risks from patient symptom data with accuracy, precision and F1-score evaluation.

Python Scikit-learn Classification
Java · MySQL Coming to GitHub

University Management System

Full-featured desktop application with Java Swing GUI, MySQL backend and role-based access control for students and admins.

Java MySQL Swing RBAC
